routing_rules.default: ALL messages from participants route to chat-id 3 by default
routing_rules.dm_marker: If message contains 'DM' anywhere, respond directly to sender
routing_rules.implementation: 1. Check for mode switch signals -> change mode for that participant. 2. Check current mode for participant. 3. If in direct mode -> respond directly. 4. If no mode override -> check for DM marker. 5. Default -> group response.
